tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows a mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose tolerance or prediabetes, while current glucose is within normal limits. Chloride is slightly elevated, which may be due to mild dehydration or other non-specific causes. Renal function, electrolytes, and calcium are within normal ranges. No acute abnormalities detected; recommend monitoring glucose metabolism and considering further evaluation for prediabetes.

text.div: Provider Organization: Cabinet de Médecine Générale
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
